data.title: Tether Co-Founder Develops Interest-Bearing Stablecoin Competitor
data.description: According to Odaily, Aggr News has revealed that a co-founder of Tether is working on developing a new stablecoin that offers interest-bearing features. This development aims to introduce a competitive alternative in the stablecoin market.

data.title: Curve founder launches new project Yield Basis and completes $5 million in fundraising
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Curve Finance founder Michael Egorov launched a new project Yield Basis and raised $5 million at a token valuation of $50 million. The project aims to help tokenized Bitcoin and Ethereum holders earn income from market creation by mitigating impermanent losses. According to financing materials, the project sold 10% of its total supply of "YB" tokens to investors - that is, 100 million out of 1 billion tokens. The investor's vesting plan includes a 6-month lock-up period, followed by a 2-year linear unlock. (THeBlock)

data.title: Strategy Reports Significant Loss Due To Bitcoin Impairment
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin investment firm Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy, reported a net loss for the fiscal year 2024 due to a $1.79 billion impairment loss on digital assets. The company's 10-K annual report, submitted on February 18, highlights concerns about its ability to return to profitability if Bitcoin's market value significantly declines. Additionally, Strategy warned that such a downturn could affect its capacity to meet financial obligations. Under the Inflation Reduction Act, the unrealized fair value gains of its Bitcoin holdings may be subject to a 15% corporate alternative minimum tax (CAMT).

data.title: K33 Research: Bitcoin is currently in a state of low volatility, traders should remain cautious
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News K33 Research said that Bitcoin is still in a state of low volatility, with a slight decline of 2% this week. The overall market performance is sluggish as risk-averse traders reduce yields, volatility and trading volume to multi-month lows, but rarely lasts for a long time. Vetle Lunde, head of research at K33, pointed out that although the Trump administration, which supports cryptocurrencies, is good for Bitcoin and the entire industry in the long run, short-term uncertainty still keeps market activity sluggish. The overall risk aversion sentiment indicates that traders are prepared for downward volatility, and the current moderate leverage level means that the risk of liquidation chain reactions is low. Traders should remain cautious until there is a clear direction signal. (TheBlock)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 95,000 USDT with a 0.62% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 18, 2025, 16:37 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 95,000 USDT and is now trading at 94,888.617188 USDT, with a narrowed 0.62% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: A whale deposited 5.64 million $ONDO into Coinbase, worth $6.54 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 5.64 million $ONDO into Coinbase, worth 6.54 million US dollars. If sold, it will make a profit of 1.6 million US dollars. It is reported that these tokens were accumulated by the whale in the past year.

data.title: Market News: Tether Joint Venture is developing interest-bearing stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Aggr News, Tether co-founder is developing a competitive product for interest-bearing stablecoins.

data.title: Mastercard: Moving from the experimental stage to providing actual encryption solutions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Raj Dhamodharan, head of Mastercard's crypto and blockchain business, said the company has moved from the experimental stage to providing actual crypto solutions. In 2025, it will focus on developing three areas: the construction of cryptocurrency on-chain and off-chain channels, the expansion of Crypto Credential functions, and stablecoin business. It currently supports financial institutions to use stablecoins for transaction settlement, and plans to announce more partnerships and application scenarios this year. Regarding the trend of asset tokenization. (Coindesk)

data.title: FTX creditors speak on plans, lessons learned as repayments start
data.description:
The FTX collapse was painful for many creditors, causing mental distress and underscoring the dangers of keeping crypto on centralized exchanges.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ftx-creditors-speak-plans-lessons-repayments-sbf?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
